headerDisplay: 🖥️ **Computer Control** — Wake and sleep your computers from HomeKit.
footerDisplay: Computers running the Go client will auto-register. You can also manage them below.

registrationPort.title: Registration Server Port
registrationPort.description: The port on which the plugin listens for client registrations.

groupAccessoryName.title: Group Accessory Name
groupAccessoryName.description: Name of the virtual accessory that controls all computers at once (Wake All / Sleep All).

antiSleepDeviceName.title: Anti-Sleep Device Name
antiSleepDeviceName.description: Name of the virtual switch that prevents all computers from sleeping. Siri will use this name — e.g. "Hey Siri, turn on Computer Sleep Prevention". Leave empty to disable.

antiSleepTimer.title: Anti-Sleep Timer (minutes)
antiSleepTimer.description: Auto-turn-off delay in minutes. 0 = unlimited (stays on until manually turned off).

ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: The local IP address of the computer.

port.title: Client Port
port.description: Port the Go client is listening on.
